flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Orange Technical College-West Campus are 30% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($25.1k vs $36.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Orange Technical College-West Campus fell 38% between 2006 and 2009 (32.0% → 19.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Orange Technical College-West Campus rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (515 → 677).
